name: Shaun W
text: Ash Cooling & Heating LLC performed our first six-month tune-up and preventive maintenance service. He arrived early, thoroughly inspected all systems, and even performed additional tar repairs on our roof. We consistently receive exceptional customer service from this company. They are professional, friendly, and easy to communicate with. I highly recommend Ash Cooling & Heating LLC. Update: I realized I never posted this when we had our new unit installed. Ash and his team installed our new system six months ago and did an excellent job. They arrived early and had the project completed before lunch. Our house never even heated up because he walked us through all the steps to cool it down overnight so it would stay comfortable on installation day. His pricing was very competitive, and he did not try to upsell us on a unit we didn't need. We actually had a different company scheduled to do the work, but after seeing Ash installing a neighbor's unit, we spoke with him about our project. He explained that the other company was recommending a larger unit with extra features we didn't need. We are very glad we chose Ash to perform the install, and his follow-up since then has been outstanding as well. Thank you, Ash and team.
highlight: His pricing was very competitive, and he did not try to upsell us on a unit we didn't need.

name: Jennifer Lyons
text: I had the best experience with Ash cooling and Heating! From start to finish they were top-notch! They were the best price from the quotes that I received! I never felt pressured or "sold" on anything. The owner seems like a super genuine guy and committed to quality work. I went with a TRANE system- because I wanted quality I could trust and have had Trane with our previous homes. The install team were true professionals! They treated everything with care and precision and left the place spotless! Highly recommend! If I could give 10 starts I would!
highlight: They were the best price from the quotes that I received!

name: Lorin Frost
text: Exceptional Service from Ash Cooling & Heating! From start to finish, the service was exceptional. Ash was extremely professional and knowledgeable, clearly demonstrating his expertise in the field. He was very patient with all of our questions, taking the time to explain everything thoroughly without making us feel rushed. It's refreshing to find a company that prioritizes honesty & integrity. Ash and Darek were prompt, arriving exactly when he said he would, even though I over slept to open the garage. Finally, the pricing was very reasonable and fair for the high quality of work provided. If you're looking for top of the line HVAC service from someone you can trust to repair your HVAC or in my case, replace my 30 year old system, look no further than Ash Cooling & Heating. He will repair if it can be instead of just selling you a new system like so many other companies. Highly, highly recommended! Thank you, Ash & Darek!
highlight: Ash was extremely professional and knowledgeable, clearly demonstrating his expertise in the field.

name: Angela Nelson
text: They did a fabulous job and I really appreciate all they did to answer my questions and make sure that I stay cool. They were quick and easy to work with. Great bunch of guys!!
highlight: They did a fabulous job and I really appreciate all they did to answer my questions and make sure that I stay cool.

text: Our experience with Ash Cooling & Heating was great! It was easy to schedule, service was timely and the evaluation was thorough. We highly recommend Ash Cooling & Heating, he will be our first call for all future repairs!
highlight: We highly recommend Ash Cooling & Heating, he will be our first call for all future repairs!

name: LisaRose
text: I'm so glad I found Ashton of Ash Cooling & Heating. He's a veteran and a complete gentleman. He asked smart questions to get to know me and my needs, and made recommendations based on the current situation and projected future circumstances. Explained so I could understand. Reasonably priced. Neat, clean, and conscientious. I'm pleased to support his small business.
highlight: I'm so glad I found Ashton of Ash Cooling & Heating.

name: Jarrod Brown
text: Ash was professional and knowledgeable. He was able to fix what 3 other companies couldn't. Glad I came across this company, will definitely use them in the future and highly recommend this company for AC Services.
highlight: Ash was professional and knowledgeable.

name: Pamela Gallagher
text: After experiencing problems with my 2 year old unit, parts replacement, leaking roof do to poorly installed workmanship, and fried wires, the problems are really to long to list Ashton was a calm in a very long storm. The unit was not just the wrong fit it was dangerous. I needed to replace it. A Train was installed with professional pride and going a extra mile to make sure my roof is sound . It you do your homework you will not regret going with this company. This will be my Go To from now on. Thank you Ashton.
highlight: A Train was installed with professional pride and going a extra mile to make sure my roof is sound .

name: Sandra
text: 1000 stars if possible! This company is everything someone in need of service would hope for! I will be a forever customer and recommend Ash Cooling & Heating to anyone & everyone! My ac quit working on Sunday & I was just really busy. My mom asked a friend, he didn't know anyone but asked his co-worker & he highly recommended Ash. He said they aren't out to take your money but to help you with your service needs & will be fair in pricing. He was 100% correct!!! Ash answered the phone on my first call, he was very professional with a personal touch! I had an appointment scheduled asap and his promptness was greatly appreciated! The service was absolutely phenomenal & when it came to pricing, he was so generous & I couldn't have been more thankful! Don't bother looking anywhere else, this is your guy, you won't be disappointed...trust me!!
highlight: Ash answered the phone on my first call, he was very professional with a personal touch!

name: Katherine Seibert
text: Ash was great !! On time, thorough and very reasonable. I would definitely recommend him. We'll also now have a great source for A/C repairs and maintenance and soon plumbing issues as well. Thanks Ash !!

name: Jacob L
text: I can't say enough good things about this veteran-owned HVAC company. From the moment Ashton arrived, I felt completely at ease. He was professional, respectful, and incredibly knowledgeable-taking the time to explain everything in a way that made sense, without talking over my head. It was clear he wasn't just trying to get the job done; he genuinely cared about doing it right. What impressed me most was the level of trust Ashton developed throughout the visit. He was honest, straightforward, and never once made me feel like he was trying to sell me something I didn't need. That kind of transparency is rare and truly appreciated. It was clear his focus was on helping, not upselling, and that made all the difference. It means a lot to be able to support a local, veteran-owned business that truly stands behind their work. Ashton represents the best of both-someone who serves with integrity, takes pride in his craft, and delivers top-notch results. Highly recommend to anyone looking for quality HVAC service and a company you can trust.

name: Tim Pappas
text: In a time when many businesses are swallowed up by corporate conglomerates, it's refreshing to come across a company like Ash Cooling and Heating-a locally owned and operated business where integrity and personal values still take center stage. I had an urgent issue with my AC unit making a terrible noise, and Ash Heating and Cooling responded with impressive speed and professionalism. Their technician arrived promptly, diagnosed the problem efficiently, and took the time to clearly explain everything before moving forward with the repair. There was no pressure-just honesty, transparency, and a fair price. Their values are evident in the way they treat their customers, and that kind of service is increasingly rare these days. Thank you to the entire team at Ash Heating and Cooling for your outstanding work and fairness. I'll be recommending you to anyone in need of HVAC services-you've certainly earned my trust.
